notes: Frozen/applicable_false: agent=partial, daemon=incapable. gemini-cli HAS a real automatic Pro->Flash fallback (FlashFallback/fallbackModel/setFallbackMode in the bundle), and its per-message `model` field IS read by the parser — so a model-name change across turns IS observable (covered by model-identification). But the fallback is session-level: the failing Pro turn errors/settles to ready, then Flash serves subsequent turns. The scenario's load-bearing observable — a MID-TURN model change with state staying `working` and no ready-flicker — is a shape gemini-cli never emits, so the 3-state model cannot represent it. No lifecycle phases asserted (frozen).
